name: Antialian
desc: Once per turn, if this card battled a monster this Battle Phase, you can (Quick Effect): Immediately after this effect resolves, Normal Summon 1 Cyberse monster. If this face-up card you control leaves the field because of an opponent's card effect: Draw 1 card.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, if this card battled a monster this Battle Phase, you can (Quick Effect): Immediately after this effect resolves, Normal Summon 1 Cyberse monster. If this face-up card you control leaves the field because of an opponent's card effect: Draw 1 card.
eff: Once per turn, if this card battled a monster this Battle Phase, you can (Quick Effect): Immediately after this effect resolves, Normal Summon 1 Cyberse monster. If this face-up card you control leaves the field because of an opponent's card effect: Draw 1 card.

action: Activates if it leaves the field
